message.entry: ''{0}'' is a built-in function.\n
File ''{0}'' not found.
Invalid range arguments.
Size of default value must be scalar.
Size of default value must match specified dimensions {0}.
Size of default value must match specified dimensions {0} or be scalar.
Default value must be {0} or be convertible to {0}.
Class {0} is abstract. Specify a default value for property {1}.
Unrecognized class {0}.
Size of value must be scalar.
Size of value must match specified dimensions {0}.
Size of value must match specified dimensions {0} or be scalar.
Value must be {0} or be convertible to {0}.
Value must be one of:\n{0}
Value must be {0} or be convertible to {0}. See the list of valid options.
Value must be {0} or be convertible to {0}. To see the list of valid options, type enumeration(''{0}'').
Unable to construct default object of class {0}.
Error defining property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''. {2}
Error using implicit default value of property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''. {2}
{2}\nError using implicit default value of property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''.
Error setting property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''. {2}
{2}\nError setting property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''.
Error setting default value of property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''. {2}
{2}\nError setting default value of property ''{0}'' of class ''{1}''.
Using size and validation functions on an inherited property is not supported. Property ''{0}'' is defined as abstract property in superclass ''{1}''.
Superclass ''{0}'' defines validation for property ''{2}'', therefore subclass ''{1}'' is not allowed to explicitly define property ''{2}'' as Abstract.
Class ''{0}'' and class ''{1}'' both define validation for Abstract property ''{2}''. When inheriting property validation, only one superclass can define validation for property ''{2}''.

Property ''{2}'' is defined as Abstract in class ''{0}'' and not Abstract in class ''{1}''. When inheriting property validation, the property must be Abstract in all superclasses that define it and only one superclass can define validation.
Class named ''{0}'' is undefined or does not support property validation.
{0}
First input must be an instance of 'meta.Validation' class.
